testCases: TC1: input { audio_duration: 10, num_files: 2, processing_type: "transcription", premium: false } → output { total: 10, breakdown: { base_cost: 10, premium_multiplier: 1, processing_type: "transcription", rate_per_minute: 0.5, audio_duration: 10, num_files: 2 } }
TC2: input { audio_duration: 0, num_files: 1, processing_type: "transcription", premium: false } → output { error: "Audio duration must be > 0" }
TC3: input { audio_duration: -5, num_files: 1, processing_type: "transcription", premium: false } → output { error: "Audio duration must be > 0" }
TC4: input { audio_duration: 10, num_files: 0, processing_type: "transcription", premium: false } → output { error: "Number of files must be at least 1" }

TC5: input { audio_duration: 10, num_files: 1, processing_type: "invalid", premium: false } → output { error: "Invalid processing type. Must be one of: transcription, noise_reduction, mixing, mastering" }

TC6: input { audio_duration: 10, num_files: 1, processing_type: "transcription", premium: true } → output { total: 10, breakdown: { base_cost: 5, premium_multiplier: 2, ... } } (actually 10*0.5*1*2=10)
TC7: input { audio_duration: 10, num_files: 1, processing_type: "noise_reduction", premium: false } → output { total: 3, breakdown: { base_cost: 3, rate_per_minute: 0.3 } }

TC8: input { audio_duration: 99999, num_files: 99999, processing_type: "mixing", premium: false } → output { total: 99999*1*99999 = 9999800001? Actually large number, approx 9.9998e12; we don't restrict size }
TC9: input { audio_duration: 3.7, num_files: 2, processing_type: "mastering", premium: false } → output { total: 3.7*1.5*2 = 11.1, breakdown: base_cost: 11.1 }
TC10: input { audio_duration: 10, num_files: 1, processing_type: "Transcription", premium: false } → output { total: 5 } (case-insensitive)
TC11: input { audio_duration: 10, num_files: 1, premium: false } → output { error: "Processing type is required" }
TC12: input { audio_duration: 10, num_files: 1, processing_type: "transcription", premium: "true" } → output { error: "Premium must be a boolean" }
TC13: input { audio_duration: 10, num_files: 1, processing_type: "transcription", premium: null } → output { error: "Premium must be a boolean" }
TC14: input { audio_duration: "10", num_files: 1, processing_type: "transcription", premium: false } → output { error: "Audio duration must be a number" }
TC15: input { audio_duration: 10, num_files: "1", processing_type: "transcription", premium: false } → output { error: "Number of files must be a number" }
TC16: input { audio_duration: 10, num_files: 1, processing_type: "transcription", premium: undefined } → output { error: "Premium must be a boolean" }
TC17: input { audio_duration: 5, num_files: 3, processing_type: "noise_reduction", premium: false } → output { total: 5*0.3*3 = 4.5 }

TC18: input { audio_duration: 5, num_files: 1, processing_type: "noise reduction", premium: false } → output { error: "Invalid processing type. Must be one of: transcription, noise_reduction, mixing, mastering" }
TC19: input { audio_duration: 5.5, num_files: 3, processing_type: "noise_reduction", premium: false } → output { total: 5.5*0.3*3 = 4.95 }
TC20: input { audio_duration: 0.1, num_files: 1, processing_type: "mixing", premium: true } → output { total: 0.1*1*2 = 0.2 }
